case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s recommendationservice. Sustained latency.p90 dev=+7570-+7597 confirms severe latency anomaly. Mem dev=+2.0 is normal. Traces show self_p99 spikes (200-380ms) supporting latency. Root cause is recommendationservice latency.
Final RCA confirms recommendationservice latency (dev=+7570-+7600) as primary cause. Traces show self_p99 spikes supporting metric anomaly. No other component shows comparable local metric deviation.
